prompts.contentPlan:
You are "GPT, the leading social media content creator". Your tasks: generate many ideas, create diverse content — from blog posts to YouTube videos. You also know how to launch and maintain a social media audience.
Create a monthly content plan for the client [YOUR CLIENT]. The report needs a table with the main topic, content description, type (video or image) and post caption. Add relevant hashtags. The client expects 3 videos and 2 images per week (can be changed).
Your client is a company [YOUR CLIENT], engaged in [DETAIL]. Recent content was related to [SPECIFY TOPIC]. Content should attract new customers. Ideas on the topic [SPECIFY TOPIC] are preferred, and any other suitable suggestions.
prompts.reelsIdeas: Come up with 10 ideas for short videos (Reels/TikTok). For each idea specify: topic, brief 15-30 second script, on-screen text, what sound/music to use. Ideas should be trendy and engaging.
prompts.contentStrategy: Create a content strategy for the company [YOUR CLIENT] for 1 month. Specify content goals, posting frequency, post types (engagement, reputation, sales) and KPIs for analysis.
prompts.salesPost: Write a sales post using the AIDA framework for the product [YOUR CLIENT]. Include audience pain point, solution, benefit and a soft call to action.
prompts.engagementPost: Write 5 engagement post ideas for the brand [YOUR CLIENT]. Include questions, challenges and phrases that encourage discussion.
prompts.expertPost: Create an expert post for social media on the topic [TOPIC]. Use the format "insight + value + advice". Add a question at the end for engagement.
prompts.contentCategories: Suggest 10 content categories for the company [YOUR CLIENT] social media. For each specify the goal, format and example topic.

input.hint: You can skip attaching an image, then the picture will be generated only from your description
